EOF

cat /tmp/test-debug-monster.feature)

Bash(python3 -c "
import json
with open\('/home/dominique/.claude/projects/-home-dominique-git-tabletop-workshop-workshop-1/f623f55a-21cf-48f2-a7f1-90cba56f9c35.jsonl'\) as f:
    for line in f:
        obj = json.loads\(line\)
        msg = obj.get\('message', {}\)
        role = msg.get\('role', ''\)
        content = msg.get\('content', ''\)
        if isinstance\(content, list\):
            content = ' '.join\(c.get\('text',''\) for c in content if isinstance\(c, dict\) and 'text' in c\)
        if isinstance\(content, str\) and len\(content\) < 3000:
            cl = content.lower\(\)
            if 'charactervisual' in cl or '#2' in content or 'issue 2' in cl or 'copie' in cl or 'initiale' in cl:
                print\(f'=== {role} \({len\(content\)} chars\) ==='\)
                print\(content[:1500]\)
                print\(\)
" 2>&1 | head -200)

Bash(git add scripts/ralph/ralph.sh .gitignore && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: tee Claude output to per-iteration log files

Output goes to both terminal and .ralph/logs/iteration-N-STORY.log,
enabling tail -f monitoring from another terminal during AFK sessions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push)

Bash(git add scripts/ralph/jira-sync.sh && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
fix: don't preserve passes for stories pulled as To Do from JIRA

The merge logic restored passes:true from the local prd.json even
when JIRA said the story was back to To Do. Since pull only fetches
To Do stories, all returned stories should start with passes:false.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
merge: ralph/MFG-7 into main — Core Mechanics \(MFG-11 to MFG-17\)

Merges Ralph's Step 9.1 work \(7 stories\) with main's refactoring \(MFG-50 to MFG-52\).

Conflict resolution:
- CastResolver: kept branch's richer resolveSpellCast\(\) with SpellDefinition
- MagicalResolver: kept branch's richer API \(targetType, allyAccepts\)
- Entity: merged both — branch's ward/stabilize + main's buffs map
- PreparationManager: kept branch's PREPARATION_DEFINITIONS + entityId API
- StatusEffectManager: kept branch's rich types + full burn consumption \(bug fix\)
- tests/steps/index.ts: merged all imports from both sides

Bug fixes:
- Burn decay → full consumption per MFG-14 spec \(was decrementing by 1\)
- CastEffect rewired to use resolveSpellCast instead of resolveAttack

Deferred:
- MFG-56 manager refactoring \(Entity.buffs delegation\) features marked .pending

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
